name: Winter wonderland!
description:
You’ve been wandering through this endless path of pine and shrub. A snowflake falls onto your nose.

You push through the burning agony in your legs and step into a winter wonderland.

This is my first bot, so my apologies if it doesn’t work to how you want it! Though it’s for the badge :3

Tips and Friendly advice appreciated! ^^

Be nice or I’ll cry
creator: Angel.Wingz
